name: Slurm Node Failure Triage
summary: Collect read-only evidence for Slurm node-related job failures.
description: This skill helps users and support teams diagnose Slurm NODE_FAIL, BOOT_FAIL, launch-failure, and node-related job failures by collecting accounting, job, node, partition, unavailable-node reason, and log evidence without changing scheduler or node state.

tools.name: sacct
tools.notes: Required for completed-job accounting evidence when Slurm accounting is available.

tools.name: scontrol
tools.notes: Optional job and node record evidence; some sites restrict node details.

tools.name: sinfo
tools.notes: Optional partition, node-state, and unavailable-node reason evidence.

tools.name: squeue
tools.notes: Optional current job-state evidence when the job is still visible.

inputs.name: job_id
inputs.description: Slurm job id, array task id, or job step id to inspect.

inputs.name: node_name
inputs.description: Optional Slurm node name or hostlist to inspect when known.

inputs.name: log_file
inputs.description: Optional Slurm stdout, stderr, or application log to scan for node-failure clues.

inputs.name: report_dir
inputs.description: Directory where the read-only evidence bundle should be written.

outputs.name: accounting_report
outputs.description: Slurm sacct table with job and step states, exit codes, elapsed time, resources, and node lists.

outputs.name: job_record
outputs.description: Optional scontrol and squeue job records for jobs still visible to Slurm.

outputs.name: node_state_report
outputs.description: Optional sinfo and scontrol node evidence for selected nodes or visible unavailable-node reasons.

outputs.name: log_node_signals
outputs.description: Matching log lines for node failure, boot failure, launch failure, transport, filesystem, and lost-task symptoms.

outputs.name: triage_summary
outputs.description: Human-readable prompts for deciding whether to retry, reroute to support, compare array tasks, or pair with restart/requeue workflows.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example files.
Check shell syntax for the evidence collection script.
Run against a completed Slurm job with NODE_FAIL, BOOT_FAIL, launch-failure, or node-related symptoms and confirm the report stays read-only.
